name: Ath Chandi Charitar
description: Ath Chandi Charitar from Sri Dasam Granth Sahib

verses.gurmukhi: ਅਥ ਚੰਡੀ ਚਰਿਤ੍ਰ ਉਸਤਤ ਬਰਨਨੰ ॥
verses.transliteration: ath cha(n)ddee charitr usatat baranana(n) ||
verses.translation: Description of the Praise of Chandi Charitra:

verses.gurmukhi: ਭੁਜੰਗ ਪ੍ਰਯਾਤ ਛੰਦ ॥
verses.transliteration: bhuja(n)g prayaat chha(n)dh ||
verses.translation: BHUJANG PRAYAAT STANZA

verses.gurmukhi: ਭਰੈ ਜੋਗਣੀ ਪਤ੍ਰ ਚਉਸਠ ਚਾਰੰ ॥
verses.transliteration: bharai joganee patr chausaTh chaara(n) ||
verses.translation: The Yoginis have filled their beautiful vessels (with blood),

verses.gurmukhi: ਚਲੀ ਠਾਮ ਠਾਮੰ ਡਕਾਰੰ ਡਕਾਰੰ ॥
verses.transliteration: chalee Thaam Thaama(n) ddakaara(n) ddakaara(n) ||
verses.translation: And are moving at various places here and there belching thereby.

verses.gurmukhi: ਭਰੇ ਨੇਹ ਗੇਹੰ ਗਏ ਕੰਕ ਬੰਕੰ ॥
verses.transliteration: bhare neh geha(n) ge ka(n)k ba(n)ka(n) ||
verses.translation: The comely crows and vultures having liking for that place have also departed for their homes,

verses.gurmukhi: ਰੁਲੇ ਸੂਰਬੀਰੰ ਅਹਾੜੰ ਨ੍ਰਿਸੰਕੰ ॥੧॥੨੫੭॥
verses.transliteration: rule soorabeera(n) ahaaRa(n) nirasa(n)ka(n) ||1||257||
verses.translation: And the warriors have been left to decay in the battlefield undoubtedly.1.257.

verses.gurmukhi: ਚਲੇ ਨਾਰਦਉ ਹਾਥਿ ਬੀਨਾ ਸੁਹਾਏ ॥
verses.transliteration: chale naaradhau haath beenaa suhaae ||
verses.translation: Narada is moving with vina in his hand,

verses.gurmukhi: ਬਨੇ ਬਾਰਦੀ ਡੰਕ ਡਉਰੂ ਬਜਾਏ ॥
verses.transliteration: bane baaradhee dda(n)k ddauroo bajaae ||
verses.translation: And Shiva, the rider of the Bull, playing his tabor, is looking elegant.

verses.gurmukhi: ਗਿਰੇ ਬਾਜਿ ਗਾਜੀ ਗਜੀ ਬੀਰ ਖੇਤੰ ॥
verses.transliteration: gire baaj gaajee gajee beer kheta(n) ||
verses.translation: In the battlefield, the thundering heroes have fallen alongwith the elephants and horses

verses.gurmukhi: ਰੁਲੇ ਤਛ ਮੁਛੰ ਨਚੇ ਭੂਤ ਪ੍ਰੇਤੰ ॥੨॥੨੫੮॥
verses.transliteration: rule tachh muchha(n) nache bhoot preta(n) ||2||258||
verses.translation: And seeing the chopped heroes rolling in dust, the ghosts and goblins are dancing.2.258.

verses.gurmukhi: ਨਚੇ ਬੀਰ ਬੈਤਾਲ ਅਧੰ ਕਮਧੰ ॥
verses.transliteration: nache beer baitaal adha(n) kamadha(n) ||
verses.translation: The blind trunks and brave Batital are dancing and the fighting warriors alongwith the dancers,

verses.gurmukhi: ਬਧੇ ਬਧ ਗੋਪਾ ਗੁਲਿਤ੍ਰਾਣ ਬਧੰ ॥
verses.transliteration: badhe badh gopaa gulitraan badha(n) ||
verses.translation: With the small bells tied around waists have also been killed.

verses.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਸਾਧੁ ਸੰਬੂਹ ਭੀਤੰ ਅਭੀਤੇ ॥
verses.transliteration: bhe saadh sa(n)booh bheeta(n) abheete ||
verses.translation: All the resolute assemblies of saints have become fearless.

verses.gurmukhi: ਨਮੋ ਲੋਕ ਮਾਤਾ ਭਲੇ ਸਤ੍ਰੁ ਜੀਤੇ ॥੩॥੨੫੯॥
verses.transliteration: namo lok maataa bhale satr jeete ||3||259||
verses.translation: O the mother of the people! Thou hast performed a nice task by conquering the enemies, I salute Thee.3.259.

verses.gurmukhi: ਪੜੇ ਮੂੜ ਯਾ ਕੋ ਧਨੰ ਧਾਮ ਬਾਢੇ ॥
verses.transliteration: paRe mooR yaa ko dhana(n) dhaam baadde ||
verses.translation: If any foolish person recites this (poem), his wealth and property will increase here.

verses.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨੈ ਸੂਮ ਸੋਫੀ ਲਰੈ ਜੁਧ ਗਾਢੈ ॥
verses.transliteration: sunai soom sofee larai judh gaaddai ||
verses.translation: If anyone, not participating in the war, listens to it, he will be bestowed with the power of fighting. (in battle).

verses.gurmukhi: ਜਗੈ ਰੈਣਿ ਜੋਗੀ ਜਪੈ ਜਾਪ ਯਾ ਕੋ ॥
verses.transliteration: jagai rain jogee japai jaap yaa ko ||
verses.translation: And that Yogi, who repeats it, keeping awake throughout the night,

verses.gurmukhi: ਧਰੈ ਪਰਮ ਜੋਗੰ ਲਹੈ ਸਿਧਤਾ ਕੋ ॥੪॥੨੬੦॥
verses.transliteration: dharai param joga(n) lahai sidhataa ko ||4||260||
verses.translation: He will attain supreme Yoga and miraculous powers.4.260.

verses.gurmukhi: ਪੜੈ ਯਾਹਿ ਬਿਦ੍ਯਾਰਥੀ ਬਿਦ੍ਯਾ ਹੇਤੰ ॥
verses.transliteration: paRai yaeh bidhayaarathee bidhayaa heta(n) ||
verses.translation: Any student, who reads it for the attainment of knowledge,

verses.gurmukhi: ਲਹੈ ਸਰਬ ਸਾਸਤ੍ਰਾਨ ਕੋ ਮਦ ਚੇਤੰ ॥
verses.transliteration: lahai sarab saasatraan ko madh cheta(n) ||
verses.translation: He will become knowledgeable of all the Shastras.

verses.gurmukhi: ਜਪੈ ਜੋਗ ਸੰਨ੍ਯਾਸ ਬੈਰਾਗ ਕੋਈ ॥
verses.transliteration: japai jog sa(n)nayaas bairaag koiee ||
verses.translation: Anyone either a Yogi or a Sanyasi or a Vairagi, whosoever reads it.

verses.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੈ ਸਰਬ ਪੁੰਨ੍ਰਯਾਨ ਕੋ ਪੁੰਨਿ ਹੋਈ ॥੫॥੨੬੧॥
verses.transliteration: tisai sarab pu(n)nrayaan ko pu(n)n hoiee ||5||261||
verses.translation: He will be blessed with all the virtues.5.261.

verses.gurmukhi: ਦੋਹਰਾ ॥
verses.transliteration: dhoharaa ||
verses.translation: DOHRA

verses.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਜੇ ਤੁਮਰੇ ਧਿਆਨ ਕੋ ਨਿਤ ਉਠਿ ਧਿਐਹੈ ਸੰਤ ॥
verses.transliteration: je je tumare dhiaan ko nit uTh dhiaaihai sa(n)t ||
verses.translation: All those saints, who will ever meditate on Thee

verses.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤ ਲਹੈਗੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਵਹਿਗੇ ਭਗਵੰਤ ॥੬॥੨੬੨॥
verses.transliteration: a(n)t lahaige mukat fal paavahige bhagava(n)t ||6||262||
verses.translation: They will attain salvation at the end and will realize the Lord.6.262.

verses.gurmukhi: ਇਤਿ ਸ੍ਰੀ ਬਚਿਤ੍ਰ ਨਾਟਕੇ ਚੰਡੀ ਚਰਿਤ੍ਰੇ ਚੰਡੀ ਚਰਿਤ੍ਰ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਬਰਨਨੰ ਨਾਮ ਅਸਟਮੋ ਧਿਆਯ ਸੰਪੂਰਨਮ ਸਤੁ ਸੁਭਮ ਸਤੁ ॥੮॥
verses.transliteration: eit sree bachitr naaTake cha(n)ddee charitre cha(n)ddee charitr usatat baranana(n) naam asaTamo dhiaay sa(n)pooranam sat subham sat ||8||
verses.translation: Here ends the Eighth Chapter entitled ‘Description of the Praise of Chandi Charitra’ in BACHITTAR NATAK.8.
